headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +10.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 73% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears dominate despite 68 quotes because 22 are at strong intensity, driving the score to its lowest point in the 136-day range.
• Frustrations remain elevated with 137 quotes and a heavy concentration of strong-intensity comments (95 out of 137).
• Optimism dropped significantly from yesterday but stays within its typical range for the period.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
